Localization.Description: A plugin was used. Attackers can manipulate TeamCity plugins to upload malicious code

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User with ID {subject.account.id} used {object.name} plugin ({reason}) to upload or hide malicious code on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} used {object.name} plugin ({reason}) to upload or hide malicious code on host {event_src.host}
